benefits.title: Quality Assurance
benefits.description: Every partner in our network meets rigorous quality standards before being recommended for any project.

benefits.title: Competitive Pricing
benefits.description: Our volume relationships and long-term partnerships translate directly into cost savings for our clients.

benefits.title: Reliable Lead Times
benefits.description: Established relationships mean priority scheduling and proactive communication when delays arise.

vendors.name: Kimball Hospitality
vendors.description: One of the largest hospitality furniture suppliers in North America. Specializes in custom hotel furniture, guest room casegoods, and lobby and lounge seating.

vendors.name: Charter Furniture
vendors.description: A hospitality-focused supplier of case goods and furniture solutions for hotel guest rooms and public spaces.

vendors.name: Benjamin West
vendors.description: A global leader in FF&E and OS&E procurement. Operates in 40+ countries with large hotel development projects. Handles vendor sourcing, cost negotiation, and procurement management.

vendors.name: Curve Hospitality
vendors.description: Provides end-to-end FF&E solutions with design coordination, furniture sourcing, and installation support. Known for turnkey hotel project execution.

vendors.name: Valley Forge Fabrics
vendors.description: One of the largest hospitality textile suppliers. Offers bedding, drapery fabrics, and upholstery textiles. Known for sustainability and brand compliance.

vendors.name: Visual Comfort & Co.
vendors.description: A premium brand known for decorative and architectural lighting. Offers guest room lighting, lobby chandeliers, wall sconces and table lamps, and designer collections.
